name: purchase_stamp
description: Purchase a new Swarm postage stamp with configurable amount and depth.

arguments.name: amount
arguments.desc: Stamp amount in wei (optional, uses default if not provided)

arguments.name: depth
arguments.desc: Stamp depth 16-24 (optional, uses default if not provided)

name: get_stamp_status
description: Get detailed information about a specific stamp including TTL, expiration, and usability.

arguments.name: stamp_id
arguments.desc: 64-character hex batch ID of the stamp

name: list_stamps
description: List all available postage stamps with their details.

name: extend_stamp
description: Extend an existing stamp with additional funds to increase its TTL.

arguments.name: stamp_id
arguments.desc: 64-character hex batch ID of the stamp to extend

arguments.name: amount
arguments.desc: Additional amount to add in wei

name: upload_data
description: Upload data to the Swarm network using a valid postage stamp (max 4KB).

arguments.name: stamp_id
arguments.desc: 64-character hex batch ID to use for upload

arguments.name: content_type
arguments.desc: MIME type of the content (optional, default: application/json)

name: download_data
description: Download data from the Swarm network using a reference hash.

name: health_check
description: Check gateway and Swarm network connectivity status.
